matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Micro and Nanotechnology Enterprise is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The MPhil in Micro and Nanotechnology Enterprise is an exciting opportunity in which world-leading scientists and successful entrepreneurs are brought together to deliver a master’s degree combining an in-depth multidisciplinary scientific programme with a global perspective on the commercial opportunities and business practice necessary for the successful exploitation in the rapidly developing fields of nanotechnology and nanomanufacturing.
